steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: ”Having proportionally large populations” is a gerund phrase that functions as the grammatical subject of the clause. The verb blank must agree with this subject in number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: ”Is” (D) is the singular verb required for a singular subject. “Are,” “were,” and “have been” are all plural forms that violate subject-verb agreement. That matches choice D — D is correct.
